# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind AI Assistant: Guided Problem-Solving in Real Time
- Summary: Showcase the newly enhanced AI assistant in CodeGrind with a guided problem-solving flow, highlighting multi-model support and real-time guidance within the editor.
- Slug: codegrind-ai-assistant-launch-tutorial
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-ai-assistant-launch-tutorial
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-06-10-codegrind-ai-assistant-launch-tutorial.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind now offers an upgraded AI assistant (Azure OpenAI) that helps users tackle LeetCode-like problems directly in the code editor, with model switching, persistent chat, and real-time guidance to accelerate learning.
- CTA: Try the new AI-assisted problem solving in CodeGrind today and share your first solved problem with a screenshot.
- Visual brief: Short looping video: 1) user opens CodeGrind editor, 2) selects AI model and receives step-by-step hints, 3) user implements solution, 4) a quick results panel shows diagnostic feedback and score

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
